title: elatinella alsinastrum
intro: Elatinella alsinastrum, also known as Alsine or Elatinella, is a type of flowering plant in the Elatinaceae family, commonly found in wetlands and along streams. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatinella alsinastrum include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections.
